requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Compulsory Certification (OCP) — Market Access Gate
requirement_topic.zh: INMETRO强制性产品认证（OCP）——市场准入门槛
requirement_topic.zht: INMETRO強制性產品認證（OCP）——市場準入門檻

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters sold in Brazil must hold INMETRO compulsory certification under the OCP (Organismos de Certificacao de Produto) scheme. The current governing instrument is Portaria INMETRO no. 140/2022 (in full enforcement since May 2025), which superseded the original Portaria 004/2011. Certification is performed by an INMETRO-accredited body (OCP) against Brazilian technical standards — principally ABNT NBR 16149 (grid-tied PV inverters — characteristics of the utility interface) and ABNT NBR 16150 (testing methods). The INMETRO mark must appear on the product and packaging before the product can be legally marketed or sold in Brazil. Without this mark, customs clearance (SISCOMEX) and distribution are blocked.
summary.zh: 在巴西销售的并网光伏逆变器必须通过INMETRO强制性产品认证（OCP）认证机构的认证。现行法规为INMETRO第140/2022号部令（自2025年5月起全面执行），该部令已取代原第004/2011号条例。认证由INMETRO认可的OCP机构依据巴西技术标准执行，主要标准为ABNT NBR 16149（并网光伏逆变器电网接口特性）和ABNT NBR 16150（测试方法）。产品及包装在巴西合法销售前必须加贴INMETRO标志，否则SISCOMEX清关及流通将受阻。
summary.zht: 在巴西銷售的併網光伏逆變器必須通過INMETRO強制性產品認證（OCP）認證機構的認證。現行法規為INMETRO第140/2022號部令（自2025年5月起全面執行），該部令已取代原第004/2011號條例。認證由INMETRO認可的OCP機構依據巴西技術標準執行，主要標準為ABNT NBR 16149（併網光伏逆變器電網接口特性）和ABNT NBR 16150（測試方法）。產品及包裝在巴西合法銷售前必須加貼INMETRO標誌，否則SISCOMEX清關及流通將受阻。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO no. 140/2022 (grid-tied PV inverter compulsory certification — supersedes Portaria 004/2011, full enforcement since May 2025)

summary.en: China uses mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA/CQC for many electrical products; however, grid-tied PV inverters are not currently in the CCC compulsory catalogue. Chinese manufacturers typically hold voluntary CQC marks and type-test reports to GB/T 37408 or GB/T 19964 issued by CESI or similar accredited labs. None of these are recognised by INMETRO or ABNT-accredited OCP bodies.
summary.zh: 中国对许多电气产品实行由CNCA/CQC管理的强制性3C认证（CCC）；但并网光伏逆变器目前不在3C强制目录内。中国制造商通常持有CQC自愿性认证标志及CESI等认可实验室出具的GB/T 37408或GB/T 19964型式试验报告，这些均不被INMETRO或ABNT认可的OCP机构所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對許多電氣產品實行由CNCA/CQC管理的強制性3C認證（CCC）；但併網光伏逆變器目前不在3C強制目錄內。中國製造商通常持有CQC自願性認證標誌及CESI等認可實驗室出具的GB/T 37408或GB/T 19964型式試驗報告，這些均不被INMETRO或ABNT認可的OCP機構所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 (PV power station grid-connection technical requirements)

gap.en: There is no mutual recognition agreement between INMETRO and Chinese certification bodies. A full ABNT NBR 16149 / NBR 16150 test campaign at an INMETRO-accredited OCP laboratory is required from scratch. GB/T reports and CQC marks carry zero weight in Brazil. Typical INMETRO OCP certification timeline: 6–9 months (3–6 months expedited if documentation is complete and tests pass on first attempt). Additionally, the product must be imported via a Brazilian legal entity (importer of record) registered in SISCOMEX; direct shipment from a Chinese manufacturer to an end user is not permitted. NCM code for PV inverters: 8504.40.90 (confirmed; reclassified from 8504.40.30 circa 2017).
gap.zh: INMETRO与中国认证机构之间不存在互认协议。必须在INMETRO认可的OCP实验室从头开展完整的ABNT NBR 16149 / NBR 16150测试。GB/T报告和CQC标志在巴西不具任何效力。INMETRO OCP认证典型周期：6至9个月（如文件齐全且首次测试通过，最快可缩短至3至6个月）。此外，产品必须通过在SISCOMEX注册的巴西法律实体（进口商）进口，不允许中国制造商直接向最终用户发货。光伏逆变器NCM编码：8504.40.90（已确认；约2017年起由8504.40.30重新分类）。
gap.zht: INMETRO與中國認證機構之間不存在互認協議。必須在INMETRO認可的OCP實驗室從頭開展完整的ABNT NBR 16149 / NBR 16150測試。GB/T報告和CQC標誌在巴西不具任何效力。INMETRO OCP認證典型週期：6至9個月（如文件齊全且首次測試通過，最快可縮短至3至6個月）。此外，產品必須通過在SISCOMEX註冊的巴西法律實體（進口商）進口，不允許中國製造商直接向最終用戶發貨。光伏逆變器NCM編碼：8504.40.90（已確認；約2017年起由8504.40.30重新分類）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INMETRO compulsory certification is a legal prerequisite for sale in Brazil; enforced at customs and by PROCON / SENACON market surveillance
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for PV inverters in China (no CCC required; GB/T type-test is voluntary)

source.url_note: Confirmed live — official INMETRO FAQ on compulsory certification for PV systems. See also INMETRO news on Portaria 140/2022: https://www.gov.br/inmetro/pt-br/centrais-de-conteudo/noticias/inmetro-atualiza-o-regulamento-para-equipamentos-de-sistemas-fotovoltaicos
source.publisher: Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia (INMETRO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PV inverters holding only GB/T or CQC certification cannot be legally sold in Brazil. INMETRO compulsory certification to ABNT NBR 16149/16150 via an accredited OCP body is the non-negotiable first step for Brazil market access — Portaria 140/2022 confirmed; enforcement deadlines have passed and active enforcement is underway. NCM code for PV inverters: 8504.40.90 (confirmed classification as of 2017; previously 8504.40.30). The product must also be imported by a SISCOMEX-registered Brazilian importer of record.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有GB/T或CQC认证的中国光伏逆变器不能在巴西合法销售。通过INMETRO认可OCP机构依据ABNT NBR 16149/16150获得强制性认证，是进入巴西市场不可绕过的第一步——第140/2022号部令已确认，执法截止日期均已届满，现已进入主动执法阶段。光伏逆变器NCM编码：8504.40.90（2017年起确认使用该分类，此前为8504.40.30）。产品还必须由在SISCOMEX注册的巴西进口商负责进口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有GB/T或CQC認證的中國光伏逆變器不能在巴西合法銷售。通過INMETRO認可OCP機構依據ABNT NBR 16149/16150獲得強制性認證，是進入巴西市場不可繞過的第一步——第140/2022號部令已確認，執法截止日期均已屆滿，現已進入主動執法階段。光伏逆變器NCM編碼：8504.40.90（2017年起確認使用該分類，此前為8504.40.30）。產品還必須由在SISCOMEX註冊的巴西進口商負責進口。

requirement_topic.en: ANEEL Distributed Generation Registration (REN 1000/2021) + Local Distributor (Concessionária) Approval
requirement_topic.zh: ANEEL分布式发电注册（REN 1000/2021）及地方配电公司（Concessionária）批准
requirement_topic.zht: ANEEL分散式發電登記（REN 1000/2021）及地方配電公司（Concessionária）批准

summary.en: Beyond INMETRO product certification, connecting a grid-tied PV inverter to the Brazilian grid requires registration of the distributed-generation unit with ANEEL (Agencia Nacional de Energia Eletrica) under Normative Resolution REN 1000/2021 (which consolidated and superseded REN 482/2012 and REN 687/2015). The actual grid connection request and technical approval are processed by the local electricity distributor (concessionária or permissionária), which reviews inverter specifications, issues a connection opinion (parecer de acesso), and permits energisation. Inverters must comply with the technical standards referenced in REN 1000/2021, including ABNT NBR 16149 compatibility and anti-islanding requirements. The distributor may also require adherence to PRODIST (Electrical Energy Distribution Procedures in the National Electric System), Module 3.
summary.zh: 除INMETRO产品认证外，将并网光伏逆变器接入巴西电网还需依据ANEEL（国家电能局）第REN 1000/2021号规范性决议（整合并取代了REN 482/2012和REN 687/2015），向ANEEL注册分布式发电单元。实际并网申请和技术审批由当地配电公司（concessionária或permissionária）处理，其审查逆变器规格参数、出具接入意见书（parecer de acesso）并批准通电。逆变器须符合REN 1000/2021所引用的技术标准，包括ABNT NBR 16149兼容性及防孤岛要求。配电公司还可能要求符合PRODIST（国家电力系统配电规程）第3模块。
summary.zht: 除INMETRO產品認證外，將併網光伏逆變器接入巴西電網還需依據ANEEL（國家電能局）第REN 1000/2021號規範性決議（整合並取代了REN 482/2012和REN 687/2015），向ANEEL登記分散式發電單元。實際併網申請和技術審批由當地配電公司（concessionária或permissionária）處理，其審查逆變器規格參數、出具接入意見書（parecer de acesso）並批准通電。逆變器須符合REN 1000/2021所引用的技術標準，包括ABNT NBR 16149相容性及防孤島要求。配電公司還可能要求符合PRODIST（國家電力系統配電規程）第3模塊。

standards_or_laws: ANEEL Resolucao Normativa REN 1000/2021 (distributed generation framework)
ABNT NBR 16149:2013 (anti-islanding and grid-interface requirements, referenced by REN 1000)
Lei 14.300/2022 (Legal Framework for Distributed Micro- and Mini-Generation — Lei do Marco Legal)

summary.en: China uses a grid-company acceptance inspection process (并网验收) administered by State Grid Corporation (SGCC) or China Southern Power Grid (CSG) under national standards GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004. Distributed-generation registration in China is handled at the provincial grid-company level. The procedural framework and technical thresholds (anti-islanding trip settings, reactive-power capability) differ materially from ANEEL REN 1000/2021 requirements. Chinese grid-company acceptance records are not recognised by Brazilian concessionárias.
summary.zh: 中国由国家电网公司（SGCC）或中国南方电网（CSG）依据GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004国家标准，通过并网验收流程管理分布式发电接入。中国的分布式发电注册在省级电网公司层面处理。程序框架和技术要求（防孤岛跳闸设定、无功功率能力）与ANEEL REN 1000/2021存在实质性差异。中国电网公司的验收记录不被巴西配电公司所认可。
summary.zht: 中國由國家電網公司（SGCC）或中國南方電網（CSG）依據GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004國家標準，通過併網驗收流程管理分散式發電接入。中國的分散式發電登記在省級電網公司層面處理。程序框架和技術要求（防孤島跳閘設定、無功功率能力）與ANEEL REN 1000/2021存在實質性差異。中國電網公司的驗收記錄不被巴西配電公司所認可。

standards_or_laws: SGCC / CSG distributed-generation connection procedures (provincial level)

gap.en: Brazilian distributors require INMETRO-certified inverters that have been verified to meet REN 1000/2021 and PRODIST Module 3 technical conditions. CN grid-company approval records and GB/T anti-islanding parameters do not satisfy Brazilian distributor technical review. The importer or local EPC contractor must submit a connection request dossier (including INMETRO certificate, technical datasheet, single-line diagram) to the relevant concessionaria for each project or inverter model. ANEEL distributor approval timelines vary by concessionaria and project scale — no standardised published timeline applies; allow several weeks to several months. Additionally, import into Brazil requires a Brazilian importer of record registered in SISCOMEX. NCM code for PV inverters: 8504.40.90 (confirmed; reclassified from 8504.40.30 circa 2017). Applicable import taxes: II (import duty), IPI, PIS/COFINS, and ICMS.
gap.zh: 巴西配电公司要求INMETRO认证的逆变器已通过REN 1000/2021和PRODIST第3模块技术条件验证。中国电网公司审批记录及GB/T防孤岛参数无法满足巴西配电公司的技术审查要求。进口商或当地EPC承包商须就每个项目或逆变器型号，向相关配电公司提交并网申请档案（含INMETRO证书、技术规格书、单线图）。ANEEL配电公司审批周期因配电公司及项目规模而异，无统一公开时间表，一般需数周至数月。此外，进口至巴西须有在SISCOMEX注册的巴西进口商。光伏逆变器NCM编码：8504.40.90（已确认；约2017年起由8504.40.30重新分类）。适用进口税：II（进口关税）、IPI、PIS/COFINS及ICMS。
gap.zht: 巴西配電公司要求INMETRO認證的逆變器已通過REN 1000/2021和PRODIST第3模塊技術條件驗證。中國電網公司審批記錄及GB/T防孤島參數無法滿足巴西配電公司的技術審查要求。進口商或當地EPC承包商須就每個項目或逆變器型號，向相關配電公司提交併網申請檔案（含INMETRO證書、技術規格書、單線圖）。ANEEL配電公司審批週期因配電公司及項目規模而異，無統一公開時間表，一般需數週至數月。此外，進口至巴西須有在SISCOMEX註冊的巴西進口商。光伏逆變器NCM編碼：8504.40.90（已確認；約2017年起由8504.40.30重新分類）。適用進口稅：II（進口關稅）、IPI、PIS/COFINS及ICMS。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ANEEL REN 1000/2021 registration and local distributor (concessionária) technical approval are legally required before grid connection; SISCOMEX import registration is mandatory for all goods entering Brazil
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory grid-company acceptance (parallel process, different standards); no SISCOMEX equivalent

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil market access for grid-tied PV inverters requires clearing four sequential gates: (1) INMETRO OCP certification to ABNT NBR 16149/16150 under Portaria 140/2022 (confirmed, active) — 6–9 months typical; (2) ANEEL REN 1000/2021 distributed-generation registration (confirmed, active); (3) local concessionaria technical approval and parecer de acesso for each installation; (4) SISCOMEX import clearance (NCM 8504.40.90) via a Brazilian importer of record with payment of all applicable import taxes (II, IPI, PIS/COFINS, ICMS). No Chinese certification or grid-company approval substitutes for any of these steps.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 并网光伏逆变器进入巴西市场须依次通过四道门槛：（1）依据第140/2022号部令（已确认，现行有效）通过ABNT NBR 16149/16150的INMETRO OCP强制认证——典型周期6至9个月；（2）依据ANEEL REN 1000/2021完成分布式发电注册（已确认，现行有效）；（3）每个安装项目取得当地配电公司的技术批准及接入意见书（parecer de acesso）；（4）通过在SISCOMEX注册的巴西进口商（NCM编码8504.40.90）完成进口清关并缴纳所有适用进口税（II、IPI、PIS/COFINS、ICMS）。上述任何步骤均无法由中国认证或电网公司审批替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 併網光伏逆變器進入巴西市場須依次通過四道門檻：（1）依據第140/2022號部令（已確認，現行有效）通過ABNT NBR 16149/16150的INMETRO OCP強制認證——典型週期6至9個月；（2）依據ANEEL REN 1000/2021完成分散式發電登記（已確認，現行有效）；（3）每個安裝項目取得當地配電公司的技術批准及接入意見書（parecer de acesso）；（4）通過在SISCOMEX註冊的巴西進口商（NCM編碼8504.40.90）完成進口清關並繳納所有適用進口稅（II、IPI、PIS/COFINS、ICMS）。上述任何步驟均無法由中國認證或電網公司審批替代。
